nasb.text: They have treated father and mother lightly within you. The alien they have oppressed in your midst; the fatherless and the widow they have wronged in you.

esv.text: Father and mother are treated with contempt in you; the sojourner suffers extortion in your midst; the fatherless and the widow are wronged in you.

cnv.text: 在你裡面輕視父母的；在你中間有壓迫寄居的和欺負孤兒寡婦的。

ccb.text: 他们轻慢父母，压迫寄居者，欺负孤儿寡妇。
